sentences.english: The worst haircut I ever had was when I cut my hair completely bald.
sentences.korean: 최악의 머리 스타일은 완전히 민머리로 깎았을 때예요.

sentences.english: My eyes started to pop out and my nose looked bigger.
sentences.korean: 눈이 튀어나와 보이고 코가 더 커 보였어요.

sentences.english: Especially because I had that haircut in winter, so my head was kind of freezing.
I'm an African-American, and living outside of an African-American community and having to get a haircut can be a trying experience.
sentences.korean: 아프리카계 미국인인데 아프리카계 커뮤니티 밖에서 머리를 깎아야 하는 건 힘든 경험이 될 수 있어요.

sentences.english: The person cutting my hair cried, because she didn't understand how to cut my hair.
sentences.korean: 내 머리 자르는 법을 몰라서 미용사가 울었어요.

sentences.english: The worst haircut I ever had was when I was preparing for a job interview and asked the barber for a smart business cut.
sentences.korean: 최악의 머리는 면접 준비할 때 이발사에게 깔끔한 비즈니스 컷을 부탁했을 때예요.

sentences.english: It was completely out of sync with my age and the year.
sentences.korean: 내 나이와 시대에 완전히 안 맞았어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
